snippet.title: The Battles : Jithendra V Lakshitha | Siri Sangabodhi |  Ahankara Nagare | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Battles : A R Jithendra V Lakshitha Mihiran | Mashup | Siri Sangabodhi Maligawedi | Ahankara Nagare  | The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

තාම ඔයාට
දවසක් හරි ආදරෙ කල
මුල්ම කෙනාව

මගේ ජීවිතය 
බාරයි ඔබට
සංසාරෙම පතාන ආ
කෙනා ඔයාව

දන්නවාද රත්තරනේ
ජීවිතයම වාගේ

තියා ඔයාව 
පුදුමයි මගේ ප්‍රේමය

තිගැස්සුම් උනා හදවත
යද්දි ඔයාව

snippet.title: Poronduwak (පණට නමක් 2 ) | Manej Sanjaya New Song  | පොරොන්දුවක් මේක මගේ | Official Music Video 2021
snippet.description:
පොරොන්දුවක් මේක මගේ වෙනස් නොවන කිසිදාක..දුරස් වුනත් ඔබට හිතේ තියේවි ඉඩ හැමදාක..

Latest romantic music video "#Poronduwak" sung by singer -  #ManejSanjaya .
The Video is Directed By Thiwanka Mihiran, Lyrics by ' Prasanna Kumara Dammalage ' & Music by ' Hashan Thilina '.

Dial Now...
For Download " #Poronduwak " song as your RingIn Tone..
☎Dialog -  875284383
☎Mobitel - 74741125
☎Hutch - 369415900
☎Airtel - 8880090476

▶Song Name : Poronduwak
▶Artist : #ManejSanjaya
▶Lyrics : Prasanna Kumara Dammalage
▶Music : Hashan Thilina
▶Video Director : Thiwanka Mihiran
▶Production: #EvokeMusic

මා ඉන්නම් ඈතකින් නොගැටී ඔය ඇස් දෙකේ 
හැමදාමත් ආදරේ සඟවා හිතේ 
හිමිවීමක් නෑ ඉතින් ලං වූවට ඒ වගේ 
කවදාවත් ඉටු නොවේ පැතුමන් අපේ
අහඹුවක් නොවේ වුනත් මුණගැහීම මේ 
අරන් යන්න බෑ දුරක් ඇසුර තව අපේ 

පොරොන්දුවක් මේක මගේ වෙනස් නොවන කිසිදාක 
දුරස් වුනත් ඔබට හිතේ තියේවි ඉඩ හැමදාක

මුළු රෑ පුරා නින්දෙන් මා මුදා
ඒ මතකයන් හැමදා සිහිවෙලා 
හිත පෑරුවත් කොතරම් විඳ දරා 
ඉන්නම් ඉතින් නෑවිත් යලි සදා

හුරුකම් නිසා සසරේ පෙර එදා 
බැදුනත් ඉතින් නොදැනී නොසිතලා 
හැර යන්නේ නෑ කීවත් දිවුරලා 
අපි මේ භවේ අපගෙන් ගිලිහිලා

▶ Evoke Music

👉Follow us on Instagram: https://bit.ly/EvokeMusic_IG

snippet.title: B&B එක්ක අවුරුදු - Episode 3 | Kokila Pawan & Nimali Fernando
snippet.description:
මේ දවස්වල ටෙලිවිෂන් බලන හැමෝම වගේ හුඟක් ආදරේ කරන චරිතයක් තමයි මාලන්. මාලන් කියනවටත් වඩා "මනමාලං" කියල තමයි එයාව හුඟ දෙනෙක් අඳුනන්නෙ. ඉතිං මේ සැරේ අපේ අවුරුදු කෑම Challenge එකට එකතු වුනේ පුංචි තිරයේ මනමාලන් වූ 'කෝකිල පවන්' සහ ඔහුගේ බිරිඳ 'නිමාලි ප්‍රනාන්දු' දෙන්නා. මේ දෙන්නට අපි දුන්න Challenge එක තමයි අග්ගලා හදන්න. කොහොමින් හරි අග්ගලා හැදිල්ලට අමතරව විවාහ ජීවිතයට වැදගත් පාඩමකුත් ඉගෙන ගන්න කෝකිලට පුළුවන් වුනා.


Subscribe to : https://goo.gl/Ym9F5f 
Like us on Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/boldandbeautifullk/
Follow us on Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/boldandbeautiful_lk/

snippet.title: The Battles : Miyuru Somarathne V Thilina Sudesh | Bol Pini Wahena Welawe | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

snippet.title: 🔴LIVE: Vivek-க்காக மனம் உருகிய Mansoor Ali khan | Natty Natarajan, Nasser | Latest Video
snippet.description:
#comedianvivek #Vivek #Actorvivek

Tamil actor Vivek passed away in a Chennai hospital early on Saturday following a cardiac arrest. He was 59. Vivek was admitted to the intensive care unit of the hospital on Friday morning after he suffered a heart attack. A medical bulletin said he underwent “emergency coronary angiogram followed by angioplasty” on Friday.

snippet.title: ඉස්කෝලෙට අවුරුදු | Music Pickle Awrudu Special
snippet.description:
මේ සතියේ Music Pickle වැඩසටහන ගොඩාක් වෙනස්. අලුත් අවුරුද්දත් අරගෙනම අපි ආවේ ඔයාලා ගොඩාක් ආදරේ කරන පිරිසක් එක්ක. මේ දවස් වල TV දෙරණ ඔස්සේ විකාශනය වන " ඉස්කෝලේ " ටෙලිනාට්‍යයට රංගනයෙන් දායක වන දමිත්‍රි ,ධනුශ්ක, හිරුෂි, නිසල්,තිනුලි, දිනුජ්, විනුක් සහ එහි තේමා ගීතය ගායනා කරන නුවන්දිකා සේනානායක යන අය තමා Music Pickle එක්ක අවුරුදු සමරන්න එකතු වුණේ. ඔවුන් program එක ලස්සන කරන්න ලස්සනට සින්දු කිව්වා,ලස්සන නැටුම් ඉදිරිපත් කළා. ඒ විතරක් නෙවෙයි අලුත් අවුරුදු ක්‍රීඩා කිහිපයකටම සහභාගී වුණේ ගොඩාක් උනන්දුවෙන්. ඉතින් Music pickle සමගින් එකතුවෙන්න ආරාධනා කරමින් music pickle අපි ප්‍රාර්ථනා කරනවා ඔබට ලැබුවා වූ නව වසර නිරෝගිමත් සුභම සුභ අලුත් අවුරුද්දක් වේවා කියලා.

We as a company have passion to reach out to the Tamil speaking population world over with the honest and responsible presentation of news and current affairs that reflects the true spirit of journalism and reported with authenticity, clarity and definitive conviction. snippet.title: මාගල්කන්දේ සුදද්ත ගෝඨාගේ කුපාඩි වැඩ රැසක් හෙලිකරයි
snippet.description:
https://lrnews.ch/
https://www.facebook.com/lrnews.ch/
Im D.M. Thushara Jayarathna and studied at Ananda Sastralaya, Kotte. Im working as an Investigative Web Journalist For my higher studies, I joined with Sabaragamuwa University, Management Faculty as a management student and after that I joined to Sri Lanka Law College as a Law student. I have won the Gold medal addressing Juri competition and as well as I was the Captain of Law College Debating Team. 
 
I'm the one who made complain against Mr. Namal Rajapaksha, son of former president Mr. Mahinda Rajapaksha regarding cheating the Law College Examination. After that incident, I faced political problems and life threats. Due to this reason, In the year of 2012 I left my country and currently I'm living in Switzealand. 
 
 
I dedicated my life to establish Democracy and Rule of Law of my country.

localized.title: මාගල්කන්දේ සුදද්ත ගෝඨාගේ කුපාඩි වැඩ රැසක් හෙලිකරයි
localized.description:
https://lrnews.ch/
https://www.facebook.com/lrnews.ch/
Im D.M. Thushara Jayarathna and studied at Ananda Sastralaya, Kotte. Im working as an Investigative Web Journalist For my higher studies, I joined with Sabaragamuwa University, Management Faculty as a management student and after that I joined to Sri Lanka Law College as a Law student. I have won the Gold medal addressing Juri competition and as well as I was the Captain of Law College Debating Team. 
 
I'm the one who made complain against Mr. Namal Rajapaksha, son of former president Mr. Mahinda Rajapaksha regarding cheating the Law College Examination. After that incident, I faced political problems and life threats. Due to this reason, In the year of 2012 I left my country and currently I'm living in Switzealand. 
 
 
I dedicated my life to establish Democracy and Rule of Law of my country.

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: Reacting to my 'Green Screen Challenge' videos
snippet.description:
I have asked my audience to use the green screen footage I have provided to make a funny and creative video. In this video, I am reacting to a few of those videos and choosing 3 winners, who will be awarded cases of Red Bull cans. There were 200+ entries to this competition and I am super proud of all of you for participating in it. Doesn't matter if your video was good enough or not, I appreciate the effort every one of you has put into your videos. Raspat and keep improving!
*Special thanks to Red Bull for making this possible!

**********************
Green screen entries which I react to in this video in order:
WeBaA - https://youtu.be/Qq2sf69Vzso
Sri Meme - https://youtu.be/MZQVwXRCAlA
Shimraan Mahir - https://youtu.be/NGUwOE4CfFA
JAYY - https://youtu.be/DK7UYlpCoLU
Dr. Saico - https://youtu.be/SF5gvSh_-DE
HeshanOnYoutube - https://youtu.be/cdP16jWad34
VolkaYami - https://youtu.be/eJhPK3-BPgQ
SANO - https://youtu.be/Pqq5CRM7XTM
Hirusha Ruwanka - https://youtu.be/rdggoDXU6j0
Sri Meme - https://youtu.be/-q6iGhslwlU
SP Janith Ushan - https://youtu.be/a4IZAKrjuy8
**********************

snippet.title: Asku Maaro Video | Kavin, Teju Ashwini | Dharan Kumar | K. Sivaangi | Dongli Jumbo | Sandy
snippet.description:
Stream now - https://SMI.lnk.to/AskuMaaro

The rollicking music video of #AskuMAaro composed by #DharanKumar starring #Kavin , #TejuAshwini& #Sivaangi is here! This unapologetically fun and groovy song has lyrics by #KuKarthik and is all ready to make its way to your favourite Tamil Playlist and you simply cannot miss this one! 

Song - Asku Maaro
Composed by Dharan Kumar
Featuring - Kavin, Teju Ashwini
Sung by Dharan Kumar & K. Sivaangi
Lyrics - Ku. Karthik
Directed by Dongli Jumbo
DOP - Madhesh Manickam
Direction team - Raaja Senthil | Joshi | Nethan
Dop Team - Ilayaraja , Yuvaraj Dakshan ,Sandy Sanyog.


The Route - Jagadish Palanisamy
Creative Director Karthik Srinivas (NOISE AND GRAINS)
Business Director Mahaveer Ashok (NOISE AND GRAINS)

Direction team - Raaja Senthil | Joshi | Nethan
Asst Choreographer

snippet.title: 'Mrs World' grabs crown from head of ‘Mrs Sri Lanka’ in on-stage fracas
snippet.description:
Police have arrested the reigning “Mrs World” on charges of assault over an on-stage fracas in which she pulled the crown off the head of the new “Mrs Sri Lanka”. 

Subscribe to Guardian News on YouTube ► http://bit.ly/guardianwiressub

Caroline Jurie yanked the crown off Pushpika de Silva minutes after she was declared “Mrs Sri Lanka 2020” during a gala in Colombo on April 4. Jurie declared that Pushpika de Silva was ineligible as the winner because she was divorced, and forcibly removed her crown. De Silva needed hospital treatment after the incident, seen by stunned spectators in a packed venue as well as a live social media audience. 

To qualify for the title, contestants must be married. De Silva is estranged from her husband, but they are still legally married. The local franchise holder for the pageant, Chandimal Jayasinghe, said they were “deeply disturbed and sincerely regret” the behaviour of Jurie and the told the media the crown would be returned to De Silva 

‘Mrs World’ arrested for grabbing crown from head of ‘Mrs Sri Lanka’ ► https://www.theguardian.com/world/2021/apr/08/mrs-world-arrested-for-grabbing-crown-from-head-of-mrs-sri-lanka

The Guardian publishes independent journalism, made possible by supporters. Contribute to The Guardian today ► https://bit.ly/3uhA7zg

About Polimer News:

Polimer News brings unbiased News and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.

Polimer News has evolved as a 24 hours Tamil News satellite TV channel. Polimer is the second largest MSO in TN catering to millions of TV viewing homes across 10 districts of TN. Founded by Mr. P.V. Kalyana Sundaram, the company currently runs 8 basic cable TV channels in various parts of TN and Polimer TV, a fully integrated Tamil GEC reaching out to millions of Tamil viewers across the world. The channel has state of the art production facility in Chennai. Besides a library of more than 350 movies on an exclusive basis , the channel also beams 8 hours of original content every day. The channel has extended its vision to various genres including Reality. In short, Polimer is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. Polimer’s biggest strength is its people. The channel has some of the best talent on its rolls. A clear vision backed by the best brains gives Polimer a clear cut edge in the crowded Tamil TV landscape.

snippet.title: Nayanthara Latest Blockbuster Tamil Movie | Engal Ayya | Namitha | Balakrishna | Sneha Ullal
snippet.description:
Watch Engal Ayya (Simha) Full Movie.

Starring: #Nayanthara​, Balakrishna​, Namitha, Sneha Ullal, Venu Madhav, ​ and others.
Director : Boyapati Srinu
Music Director : Chakri
Producer: I & M Studios

Synopsis:
Balakrishna Stars As Srimann Narayana, A College Professor Who’s Hot-Blooded By Nature. He Doesn’t Tolerate Injustice And Would Go To Any Length To Save The Ones Who Are Close To His Heart. One Day, A New Girl Named Janaki (Sneha Ullal) Joins His College And Almost Immediately Janaki Falls In Love With Him. Even Srimann Narayana’s Grandmother Likes Janaki And Asks Him To Marry Janaki. However, Janaki Has A Violent Past Which Is Closely Linked To Srimann’s Own Past. Soon, His Grandmother Narrates All About His Past, His Father And Royal Family. What Did She Tell Him? Who Was Srimann’s Father? How Is Janaki Related To Narayana?

#BhavaniHDMovies

snippet.title: Kutty Pattas Music Video | Ashwin | Reba John | Venki | Santhosh Dhayanidhi | Sandy
snippet.description:
A brilliantly vivid splash of colours and a wildly fun #KuttyPattas composed by the Raati fame #SanthoshDhayanidhi featuring the most exciting cast one could ask for! Is there a better way to head into the weekend? #Ashwin, the current darling of Tamil Television features alongside the stunningly beautiful #RebaJohn in this groovy music video directed by #Venky and choreographed by #Sandy. Watch it here and bring out the moves !

snippet.title: The Battles : Harith Wijeratne V Ganga Abeynayake  | Sandak Nagi (සඳක් නැගී) | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

snippet.title: එංගලන්ත කෝටිපතියෙකුගේ මෙරට දුක්විඳින අම්මා | Point Of Pavithra
snippet.description:
අම්මා කෙනෙකුට විඳින්න පුළුවන් දුකක් නොවෙයි ඇය විඳින්නේ.. දරුවන් හතර දෙනෙකු සිටියත් ඉරණම් හතරකට ලියවුණු ඔහුන්ගේ ජීවිත නිසා අදටත් උදේ හවස කඳුළු බොන ශ්‍රීයානි අම්මගේ කතාවයි මේ.

snippet.title: Most Secret Underground Water pool in Sri Lanka | Nil Diya Pokuna
snippet.description:
Nil Diya Pokuna - Distance from Ella – 15.6 km (35 minutes)
[ Most Secret Underground Water pool in Sri Lanka ]
__________________________________________________
** Pro Guide | Nil Diya Pokuna 👉 +94760194565 ( Mr.Meththananda ) **
** Bathing Place 👉 Pallewela Ella **
    Location : https://goo.gl/maps/wYRMABZj7khQ1qnK6

Nil Diya Pokuna is an underwater pond situated in a cave or a tunnel complex in Ella which is believed to have been built by king Ravana. The pond lies 80 meters deep inside a mountain cave in Karandagolla.

The cave can be accessed via two independent entrances, of which the better-known one is situated in a forest reservation in the area. A villager then discovered a second entrance on a private property. The cave has a rabbit hole entrance through which the pond can be reached.

Nil Diya Pokuna is a place to be explored by the adventurous and caution should be taken during this journey. The water of the pond is crystal clear and gives a blue tinge of color when it reflects with light.

Like us on FB :👉 https://www.facebook.com/trippisso
Follow us on Instagram :👉 https://www.instagram.com/trippisso
Backpack Partner : BagsPop.lk | +94702408080
GoPro Partner : Camera point  | +94773222445 / +94772242445


Our Camera Tools 👉  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1PkkhQpfiDs
Editing Tools : I Mac 21" , Final cut pro X, Photoshop CC
#Nil_Diya_Pokuna #Trip_Pisso #Ella

bn.title: শ্রীলঙ্কার মোস্ট সিক্রেট আন্ডারগ্রাউন্ড ওয়াটার পুল | নীল দিয়া পোকুনা
bn.description:
শ্রীলঙ্কার মোস্ট সিক্রেট আন্ডারগ্রাউন্ড ওয়াটার পুল | নীল দিয়া পোকুনা

নীল দিয়া পোকুনা একটি পানির নীচে জলাশয় যা একটি গুহা বা এলাতে একটি টানেল কমপ্লেক্সে অবস্থিত যা বিশ্বাস করা হয় যে রাজা রাবণের দ্বারা নির্মিত হয়েছিল। করান্দাগোল্লায় একটি পর্বত গুহার ভিতরে পুকুরটি ৮০ মিটার গভীর অবস্থিত।

গুহাটি দুটি স্বতন্ত্র প্রবেশদ্বার দিয়ে অ্যাক্সেস করা যায়, যার মধ্যে সুনিপুণ পরিচিতটি একটি অঞ্চলে বন সংরক্ষণে অবস্থিত। তারপরে একজন গ্রামবাসী একটি ব্যক্তিগত সম্পত্তির দ্বিতীয় প্রবেশদ্বার আবিষ্কার করলেন। গুহার একটি খরগোশের গর্ত প্রবেশদ্বার রয়েছে যার মাধ্যমে পুকুরটি পৌঁছানো যায়।

নীল দিয়া পোকুনা এমন এক স্থান যাঁরা অভিযাত্রী দ্বারা অন্বেষণ করা যায় এবং এই যাত্রার সময় সতর্কতা অবলম্বন করা উচিত। পুকুরের জলটি স্ফটিক স্বচ্ছ এবং হালকা রঙের সাথে প্রতিফলিত হয়ে রঙের একটি নীল রঙ দেয়

ar.title: تجمع المياه الجوفية الأكثر سرية في سري لانكا | نيل ديا بوكونا
ar.description:
تجمع المياه الجوفية الأكثر سرية في سري لانكا | نيل ديا بوكونا

Nil Diya Pokuna هي بركة تحت الماء تقع في كهف أو مجمع نفق في إيلا يعتقد أن الملك رافانا بناه. تقع البركة على عمق 80 مترًا داخل كهف جبلي في كارانداجولا.

يمكن الوصول إلى الكهف عبر مدخلين مستقلين ، أحدهما الأكثر شهرة يقع في محمية غابة بالمنطقة. اكتشف أحد القرويين بعد ذلك مدخلاً ثانيًا لعقار خاص. يحتوي الكهف على مدخل حفرة أرنب يمكن من خلاله الوصول إلى البركة.

Nil Diya Pokuna هو مكان يستكشفه المغامرون ويجب توخي الحذر خلال هذه الرحلة. مياه البركة صافية تمامًا وتعطي مسحة زرقاء من اللون عندما تنعكس بالضوء.

en.title: Most Secret Underground Water pool in Sri Lanka | Nil Diya Pokuna
en.description:
Nil Diya Pokuna - Distance from Ella – 15.6 km (35 minutes)
[ Most Secret Underground Water pool in Sri Lanka ]
__________________________________________________
** Pro Guide | Nil Diya Pokuna 👉 +94760194565 ( Mr.Meththananda ) **
** Bathing Place 👉 Pallewela Ella **
    Location : https://goo.gl/maps/wYRMABZj7khQ1qnK6

Nil Diya Pokuna is an underwater pond situated in a cave or a tunnel complex in Ella which is believed to have been built by king Ravana. The pond lies 80 meters deep inside a mountain cave in Karandagolla.

The cave can be accessed via two independent entrances, of which the better-known one is situated in a forest reservation in the area. A villager then discovered a second entrance on a private property. The cave has a rabbit hole entrance through which the pond can be reached.

Nil Diya Pokuna is a place to be explored by the adventurous and caution should be taken during this journey. The water of the pond is crystal clear and gives a blue tinge of color when it reflects with light.

te.title: శ్రీలంకలో అత్యంత రహస్య భూగర్భ నీటి కొలను | నిల్ డియా పోకునా
te.description:
శ్రీలంకలో అత్యంత రహస్య భూగర్భ నీటి కొలను | నిల్ డియా పోకునా

నిల్ డియా పోకునా అనేది ఒక గుహలో లేదా ఎల్లాలోని ఒక సొరంగ సముదాయంలో ఉన్న నీటి అడుగున చెరువు, దీనిని రావుడు రావుడు నిర్మించాడని నమ్ముతారు. ఈ చెరువు కరాండగోల్లాలోని ఒక పర్వత గుహ లోపల 80 మీటర్ల లోతులో ఉంది.

ఈ గుహను రెండు స్వతంత్ర ప్రవేశ ద్వారాల ద్వారా చేరుకోవచ్చు, వీటిలో బాగా తెలిసినది ఈ ప్రాంతంలో అటవీ రిజర్వేషన్‌లో ఉంది. ఒక గ్రామస్తుడు ఒక ప్రైవేట్ ఆస్తిపై రెండవ ప్రవేశాన్ని కనుగొన్నాడు. ఈ గుహలో కుందేలు రంధ్రం ప్రవేశం ఉంది, దీని ద్వారా చెరువు చేరుకోవచ్చు.

నిల్ డియా పోకునా సాహసోపేత అన్వేషించాల్సిన ప్రదేశం మరియు ఈ ప్రయాణంలో జాగ్రత్త వహించాలి. చెరువు యొక్క నీరు క్రిస్టల్ స్పష్టంగా ఉంటుంది మరియు ఇది కాంతితో ప్రతిబింబించేటప్పుడు నీలిరంగు రంగును ఇస్తుంది.

zh-Hans.title: 斯里兰卡最秘密的地下水池|尼尔·迪亚·波库纳
zh-Hans.description:
尼尔·迪亚·波库纳（Nil Diya Pokuna）是一个水下池塘，位于埃拉（Ella）的山洞或隧道群中，据信是拉瓦那国王建造的。池塘位于Karandagolla的山洞内80米深处。

可以通过两个独立的入口进入该洞穴，其中最著名的一个入口位于该地区的森林保护区中。一位村民随后在私人财产上发现了第二个入口。这个山洞有一个兔子洞入口，通过它可以到达池塘。

Nil Diya Pokuna是一个充满冒险精神的探索场所，在此旅途中应格外小心。池塘里的水清澈见底，当光线反射时会发出蓝色调。

ta.title: இலங்கையில் மிகவும் ரகசிய நிலத்தடி நீர் குளம் | நில் தியா போகுனா
ta.description:
இலங்கையில் மிகவும் ரகசிய நிலத்தடி நீர் குளம் | நில் தியா போகுனா

நில் தியா போகுனா என்பது ஒரு குகை அல்லது எல்லாவில் உள்ள ஒரு சுரங்கப்பாதை வளாகத்தில் அமைந்துள்ள ஒரு நீருக்கடியில் குளம், இது இராவணன் மன்னரால் கட்டப்பட்டதாக நம்பப்படுகிறது. கரண்டகொல்லாவில் உள்ள ஒரு மலை குகைக்குள் 80 மீட்டர் ஆழத்தில் இந்த குளம் அமைந்துள்ளது.

இந்த குகையை இரண்டு சுயாதீன நுழைவாயில்கள் வழியாக அணுகலாம், அவற்றில் நன்கு அறியப்பட்ட ஒன்று அப்பகுதியில் உள்ள வன இட ஒதுக்கீட்டில் அமைந்துள்ளது. ஒரு கிராமவாசி ஒரு தனியார் சொத்தின் இரண்டாவது நுழைவாயிலைக் கண்டுபிடித்தார். குகைக்கு முயல் துளை நுழைவாயில் உள்ளது, இதன் மூலம் குளத்தை அடைய முடியும்.

நில் தியா போகுனா சாகசக்காரர்களால் ஆராயப்பட வேண்டிய இடம், இந்த பயணத்தின் போது எச்சரிக்கையாக இருக்க வேண்டும். குளத்தின் நீர் படிக தெளிவானது மற்றும் ஒளியுடன் பிரதிபலிக்கும் போது நீல நிறத்தை அளிக்கிறது.

hi.title: श्रीलंका में सबसे गुप्त भूमिगत जल कुंड | निल दीया पोकुना
hi.description:
श्रीलंका में सबसे गुप्त भूमिगत जल कुंड | निल दीया पोकुना

निल दीया पोकुना एक पानी के नीचे का तालाब है जो एला में एक गुफा या एक सुरंग परिसर में स्थित है, जिसके बारे में माना जाता है कि इसे राजा रावण द्वारा बनाया गया था। यह तालाब करंदागोला की एक पहाड़ी गुफा के अंदर 80 मीटर गहरा है।

गुफा को दो स्वतंत्र प्रवेश द्वारों के माध्यम से पहुँचा जा सकता है, जिनमें से बेहतर ज्ञात क्षेत्र में वन आरक्षण में स्थित है। एक ग्रामीण ने फिर एक निजी संपत्ति पर दूसरा प्रवेश द्वार खोजा। गुफा में एक खरगोश छेद प्रवेश द्वार है जिसके माध्यम से तालाब तक पहुंचा जा सकता है।

निल दीया पोकुना साहसिक जगह की खोज की जाने वाली जगह है और इस यात्रा के दौरान सावधानी बरतनी चाहिए। तालाब का पानी क्रिस्टल स्पष्ट है और यह प्रकाश के साथ प्रतिबिंबित होने पर नीले रंग का रंग देता है।

ja.title: スリランカで最も秘密の地下水プール|ニルディヤポクナ
ja.description:
スリランカで最も秘密の地下水プール|ニルディヤポクナ

Nil Diya Pokunaは、ラーヴァナ王によって建てられたと考えられているエラの洞窟またはトンネル複合施設にある水中の池です。池はカランダゴラの山の洞窟の奥深く80メートルにあります。

洞窟には2つの独立した入り口からアクセスできます。そのうちの有名な入り口は、この地域の森林保護区にあります。その後、村人は私有地の2番目の入り口を発見しました。洞窟にはうさぎの穴の入り口があり、そこから池に行くことができます。

Nil Diya Pokunaは冒険好きな人が探索する場所であり、この旅の間は注意が必要です。池の水は透き通っており、光を反射すると青みがかった色になります。

it.title: La piscina d'acqua sotterranea più segreta dello Sri Lanka | Nil Diya Pokuna
it.description:
La piscina d'acqua sotterranea più segreta dello Sri Lanka 

Nil Diya Pokuna è uno stagno sottomarino situato in una grotta o in un complesso di tunnel a Ella che si ritiene sia stato costruito dal re Ravana. Lo stagno si trova a 80 metri di profondità all'interno di una grotta di montagna a Karandagolla.

Alla grotta si accede tramite due ingressi indipendenti, di cui il più noto è situato in una riserva forestale della zona. Un abitante del villaggio ha poi scoperto un secondo ingresso su una proprietà privata. La grotta ha un ingresso nella tana del coniglio attraverso il quale è possibile raggiungere lo stagno.

Nil Diya Pokuna è un luogo da esplorare per i più avventurosi e durante questo viaggio è necessario prestare attenzione. L'acqua del laghetto è cristallina e dà una sfumatura blu quando si riflette con la luce.

snippet.description:
Dream Warrior Pictures Proudly Presents the Video Song of “Jai Sulthan” From Karthi's #Sulthan, Directed By Bakkiyaraj Kannan. #Karthi | #RashmikaMandanna | #BakkiyarajKannan | #VivekMervin | #Anirudh  | #SRPrabhu | #DreamWarriorPictures

Song: Jai Sulthan
Music: VIVEK - MERVIN
Lyrics: Viveka
Singers: Anirudh Ravichander, Junior Nithya & Gana Guna

iTunes:https://music.apple.com/in/album/jai-sulthan-from-sulthan-single/1552701719?at=1l3v9Tx&uo=4&app=itunes

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/3t8eTRRkTRs9mxxYWZK9Xz

Amazon Music: https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08W5C3LWC

Resso : https://m.resso.app/ZSJ19eWPk/

YouTube Music: https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=VOw1RYZFU_Q&feature=share

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/jai-sulthan

Hungama: https://www.hungama.com/album/jai-sulthan-from-sulthan/62168286/

Jio Saavn: https://www.jiosaavn.com/album/jai-sulthan-from-sulthan/cqF5r2p8hIA_

Wynk Music: https://wynk.in/u/j7ooonu7M

*பாடல் வரிகள்*

சண்டையில கீயாத 
சட்டையில்லா குமாரே

ஹேய் …ஹேய் 
ஹேய் …ஹேய் 

மண்டை ரெண்டா போவாட்டா 
சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே 

ஹேய் …ஹேய் 
ஹேய் …ஹேய் 

ஏய்...தாதாமாரே .....
என் தெளலத்மாரே.... 
அட அன்ப கொட்டும் 
என்  அண்ணன்மாரே ....

ஏய்...தாதாமாரே....
என் தெளலத்மாரே ....
அட அன்ப கொட்டும் 
என் அண்ணன்மாரே .....

ஏய் மத்தநாளு கிதான்றதே,சந்தேக கேசே ….
இங்க மன்ஷனுங்க ,எல்லாருமே  காமடி பீசே ...
நீ வாயகட்டி  வயத்தகட்டி ,சேக்காத காசே ...
சோறு துண்ணும்போது விக்கிச்சீனா 
எல்லாம் குளோசே ...

வா...சுல்தான் ,வா...சுல்தான்...
வா ...சுல்தான் ,வா ...சுல்தான் ...
வா....

உனக்குன்னுதான் ,தரவா.. தரவா 
உசுர தரவா..
கலக்குறியே சுல்தான் 
வா சுல்தான் ,வா சுல்தான் 
வா சுல்தான் ,வா ...

உனக்குன்னுதான்,தரவா …தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...

ஏய்...தாதாமாரே,என் தெளலத்மாரே ...
அட அன்ப கொட்டும் ,என் அண்ணன்மாரே...


ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் குந்தல்,
நிக்கல் குந்தல்
நிக்கலு  குந்தல்
நிக்கலு குந்தலு 

சபா டேய் ....
வயசாகுது  டா...
அய்யயோ …
அடங்கமாட்டீங்களா டா …

டேய்..
ஹே ஊரில் ரொம்ப பெரு 
மூஞ்ச உத்து பாரு ,
பூரான் உட்டு இருப்போம் 


மொரட்டு பீஸு …எல்லாம் ….
உருட்டு கட்டையால…
பொரட்டி …போட்டி …எடுப்போம் 
ஊய் ..சொக்கா மாட்டிகினு 
சோலி பாக்க …போனா 
தொக்க ஆல …புடிப்போம் 
பீடா போட்டமேறி …வாய கோயப்பிட்டு 
டாடா காட்டி …வருவோம் 

சம்பவம் செய்யும் வேலைய எல்லாம் 
அஞ்சாறு வாரம் ஒத்தி போடு ….
வம்புக்கு யாரும் வந்தாலும் கூட …
வள்ளலார் போல வணக்கம் போடு 

வா...சுல்தான் ,வா...சுல்தான்...
வா ...சுல்தான் ,வா ...சுல்தான் ...
வா.... 
உனக்குன்னுதான்,தரவா தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...

வா...சுல்தான்,வா...சுல்தான்...
வா ...சுல்தான் ,வா ...சுல்தான் ...
வா.... 

உனக்குன்னுதான், தரவா  தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...
தூக்கி சொல்லு….

வா சுல்தான் , வா சுல்தான் 
வா சுல்தான் ,வா ...

உனக்குன்னுதான் தரவா  தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...

சண்டையில கீயாத ,சட்டையில்லா குமாரே
மண்டை ரெண்டு போவாட்டா, சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே 

சண்டையில கீயாத, சட்டையில்லா குமாரே
மண்டை ரெண்டா போவாட்டா ,சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே 

சண்டையில கீயாத ,சட்டையில்லா குமாரே
மண்டை ரெண்டா போவாட்டா, சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே …

snippet.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. Written and Directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna, Dhanunjay, Rao Ramesh & Ajay Ghosh
a
The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#Pushpa​ #IntroducingPushpaRaj #AlluArjun​ #PushpaTeaser #PreludeOfPushparaj #Rashmika​ #Faasil #Sukumar​ #DSP #MythriMovieMakers​ 

Directed by Sukumar
Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y. Ravi Shankar
Starring: Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil, Rashmika Mandanna
Music by Devi Sri Prasad
Cinematography: Miroslaw Kuba Brozek
Edited by Karthika Srinivas
Production Companies: Mythri Movie Makers, Muttamsetty Media
Release Date:13 August 2021

Song Lyrics:
මේ කියන්නෙ ජිවිතෙ ඇත්තම කතාවක් මන් 
ප්‍රර්තනා සුන් වු මගක් නැති වු කෙනෙක් අද මන් 
හඩවන්න ඕන ඕන ඕන විදියට නැ දුකක් මට 
හැමොටම පේන පේන පේන විදියට වැරදි කරු මම 

සුදු මුහුනේ පින් පාට - අඩු නැතිවම තිබුනාට 
නුබ වාගේ සැර පරුෂ - කෙල්ලෙක් නැ දැක්කෙ මම

අනන්තවත් රැයවල් පහන් කලේ -හෙට ඔයා මගෙන් මග හැරෙයි බියෙ
වෙලාව දැන් - ඇවිදින් වගෙ ලදේ
කතාව දැන් - අහවර වෙලා අපේ

සුදු මුහුනේ....

බලන්න වත් -කවුරුත් නැතත් ඔහේ 
මම හිනා වෙලා - ඉන්නවා හොදේ 
අපායකින් ගැලවි -ගියා වගේ 
හැගිමකුයි ඇත්තෙ මගෙ හිතෙ

snippet.title: Make a peach blossom crown with silk flowers | 用绢花工艺做了套桃花发冠，带上爱人浪了一把春天丨Liziqi Channel
snippet.description:
Please  subscribe to 【李子柒 Liziqi 】Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#李子柒#Liziqi#lýtửthấ#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood
 【李子柒 Liziqi 】 https://goo.gl/nkjpSx
--------------------------------------------------------------------
Make a peach blossom crown with silk flowers, and catch the spring breeze with my dear Granny.

最近跟去年过完年一样，搁家里忙春种来着。
因为想自己做发饰拍照所以有了这个视频
用真丝布料做了些“绢花”工艺的汉服饰品
趁着春色正好，桃花漫山
带上老人家去她一直想去的地方做作的浪了浪
了了念想
As a spring ritual after the new year, I’ve been busy sowing recently back at home.
In the mood for some hand-made hair accessories,
I made these Hanfu ornaments with silk flowers, and had this video shot.
In this pretty spring, when peach blossoms dye the mountain,
take my dear lady to the place full of memory, where all is found,
and tick yet another one from her wish list.
-----------------------------------------------

ja.title: 絹で桃花の冠を作りました｜李子柒 丨Liziqi Channel
ja.description:
Please  subscribe to 【李子柒 Liziqi 】Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#李子柒#Liziqi#lýtửthấ#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood
 【李子柒 Liziqi 】 https://goo.gl/nkjpSx
--------------------------------------------------------------------
Make a peach blossom crown with silk flowers, and catch the spring breeze with my dear Granny.

最近跟去年过完年一样，搁家里忙春种来着。
因为想自己做发饰拍照所以有了这个视频
用真丝布料做了些“绢花”工艺的汉服饰品
趁着春色正好，桃花漫山
带上老人家去她一直想去的地方做作的浪了浪
了了念想

最近は去年と同じ、私は正月の後は春まきに忙しいです。
自分の手作りの髪飾りを被って写真を撮りたいから、この動画をしました。
シルク生地を使っで、漢服の飾りを「絹花」で作りました。
このかわいらしい春に、桃の花が山を染めるとき、
大切な人と一緒に、彼女がずっと見たい場所に行きました。
彼女のウィッシュリストをどんどん叶いましょう。
-----------------------------------------------

es.title: Haz una corona de durazno con flores de seda y disfruta de la brisa primaveral con mi querida abuela
es.description:
Please  subscribe to 【李子柒 Liziqi 】Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#李子柒#Liziqi#lýtửthấ#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood
 【李子柒 Liziqi 】 https://goo.gl/nkjpSx
--------------------------------------------------------------------
Haz una corona de melocotón con flores de seda y disfruta de la brisa primaveral con mi querida abuela

最近跟去年过完年一样，搁家里忙春种来着。
因为想自己做发饰拍照所以有了这个视频
用真丝布料做了些“绢花”工艺的汉服饰品
趁着春色正好，桃花漫山
带上老人家去她一直想去的地方做作的浪了浪
了了念想
Como ritual de primavera después del año nuevo, he estado sembrando recientemente en casa.
Tomé este video porque quería hacer accesorios para el cabello a mano,
Hice estos adornos de Hanfu con flores de seda e hice este video.
En esta hermosa primavera, cuando las flores de durazno tiñen la montaña,
lleva a mi querida señora al lugar lleno de memoria, donde todo se encuentra,
y marque otro de su lista de deseos.

snippet.title: Queen arrives at chapel for Prince Philip's funeral service
snippet.description:
The Queen arrives at St George's Chapel, where she is greeted by the Dean of Windsor, the Right Reverend David Conner.

Prince Philip's coffin is followed by senior royals, including the Prince of Wales, Princess Royal, and Princes William and Harry.

snippet.description:

Watch your favorite serials Free on Sun NXT, immediately after TV. Offer Valid till 25th Apr 2021

ඔබට මං හොඳ මදිනම් සමාවී කියන්න රත්තරනේ
ආදරේ මදි වීනම් සමුගන්න නෑ තරහ වෙන්නේ
අතින් අල්ලා ආව ගමනේ නොයා දුර මෙතනින් නවතින්නම්
ඔබට මං හොඳ මදිනම් සමාවී කියන්න රත්තරනේ //

රැවල් ඉරිලා සෙනෙහෙ නැව අපගේ දියඹේ ඈත මහ සයුරේ
ඔයා කෝ මං කෝ දෙතැනක ඇයිද අපි මේ වෙන් වෙලා යන්නේ
දිනක් දිව්රා කියූ ඔබෙ ආදරේ අද ඇයිද නතරවුනේ
ඔබට මං......

ආපු දුර ආයේ හැරිලා බැලුවොත් නොමැකෙන මතකයක් විතරයි
ඔයා මැව් ලස්සන ලෝකේ හීනයක් අද වචනයක් පමනයි
දිනක් දිව්රා කියූ ඔබෙ ආදරේ අද ඇයිද නතරවුනේ
ඔබට මං......

Presenting the Official Trailer of the Action Political Drama movie Kodiyil Oruvan. 

Kodiyil Oruvan is an upcoming movie that has Vijay Antony and Aathmika playing the lead roles. Directed by Ananda Krishnan and Music by Nivas K Prasanna.

snippet.description:
Watch Polimer News, Tamil Nadu’s No. 1 news channel, live! Catch breaking news and live reports as they emerge around the world. Stay updated on the latest stories from the worlds of politics, entertainment, sports, business, social media and so much more. Polimer News is your trusted source for crisp and unbiased news. Watch now!. 

#PolimerNews | #Polimer | #TamilNews

Tamil News | Headlines News | Speed News | World News 

... to know more watch the full video &  Stay tuned here for latest Tamil News updates...

Android : https://goo.gl/T2uStq

iOS         : https://goo.gl/svAwa8

Polimer News App Download: https://goo.gl/MedanX

Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/c/polimernews

Website: https://www.polimernews.com

Like us on: https://www.facebook.com/polimernews

Follow us on: https://twitter.com/polimernews


About Polimer News:

Polimer News brings unbiased News and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.

Polimer News has evolved as a 24 hours Tamil News satellite TV channel. Polimer is the second largest MSO in TN catering to millions of TV viewing homes across 10 districts of TN. Founded by Mr. P.V. Kalyana Sundaram, the company currently runs 8 basic cable TV channels in various parts of TN and Polimer TV, a fully integrated Tamil GEC reaching out to millions of Tamil viewers across the world. The channel has state of the art production facility in Chennai. Besides a library of more than 350 movies on an exclusive basis , the channel also beams 8 hours of original content every day. The channel has extended its vision to various genres including Reality. In short, Polimer is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. Polimer’s biggest strength is its people. The channel has some of the best talent on its rolls. A clear vision backed by the best brains gives Polimer a clear cut edge in the crowded Tamil TV landscape.
